text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? What am I doing here?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I must have been walking without thinking. I need
to stay focused.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That said, it is nice to take a moment of peace
and look at the Three Goddesses statue on
occasion.
